cleavage agent: Two missed enzyme cleavages were allowed for trypsin.
collision energy: fragmented with HCD @ 30% normalized collision energy.
fragmentation method: fragmented with HCD @ 30% normalized collision energy.
instrument: using a Vanquish Neo UHPLC System (Thermo Scientific) associated to Orbitrap Exploris™ 480.
ionization type: The mass spectrometer operated in positive ion mode at a 1.4 kV needle voltage.
labeling: Protein identification and label-free quantification (LFQ) were done in Proteome Discoverer 3.1.
